Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
from PIL import Image
import os

images = [
    \("/Users/ishiimanabu/Downloads/Gemini_Generated_Image_5a95tu5a95tu5a95.png", "賃貸_eyecatch.jpg"\),
    \("/Users/ishiimanabu/Downloads/Gemini_Generated_Image_fq44prfq44prfq44.png", "多頭飼い_eyecatch.jpg"\),
    \("/Users/ishiimanabu/Downloads/Gemini_Generated_Image_md7p5emd7p5emd7p.png", "共働き_eyecatch.jpg"\),
]

output_dir = "/Users/ishiimanabu/Shibamedia株式会社/01_編集部/03_画像・素材/"

for src, name in images:
    img = Image.open\(src\)
    W, H = img.size
    print\(f"{name}: 元サイズ {W}x{H}"\)
    # 右200px・下140pxをクロップしてウォーターマーク除去
    cropped = img.crop\(\(0, 0, W - 200, H - 140\)\)
    # 1200x630にリサイズしてJPEG保存
    resized = cropped.resize\(\(1200, 630\)\).convert\('RGB'\)
    out_path = os.path.join\(output_dir, name\)
    resized.save\(out_path, 'JPEG', quality=90\)
    print\(f"  → 保存: {out_path}"\)

print\("完了！"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
from PIL import Image
import os

# Image mapping: filename → \(article, output name\)
images = [
    \("/Users/ishiimanabu/Downloads/Gemini_Generated_Image_vai1grvai1grvai1 \(1\).png", "kyohi_eyecatch.jpg", "拒否柴"\),
    \("/Users/ishiimanabu/Downloads/Gemini_Generated_Image_vai1grvai1grvai1 \(2\).png", "doge_eyecatch.jpg", "Doge文化史"\),
    \("/Users/ishiimanabu/Downloads/Gemini_Generated_Image_vai1grvai1grvai1.png", "photo_eyecatch.jpg", "スマホ撮影"\),
]

output_dir = "/Users/ishiimanabu/Shibamedia株式会社/01_編集部/03_画像・素材/"

for src, name, label in images:
    img = Image.open\(src\)
    W, H = img.size
    print\(f"{label}: 元サイズ {W}x{H}"\)
    cropped = img.crop\(\(0, 0, W - 200, H - 140\)\)
    resized = cropped.resize\(\(1200, 630\)\).convert\('RGB'\)
    out_path = os.path.join\(output_dir, name\)
    resized.save\(out_path, 'JPEG', quality=90\)
    print\(f"  → 保存: {out_path}"\)

print\("完了！"\)
PYEOF)

from PIL import Image

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import urllib.request, json, base64

auth = base64.b64encode\(b"shibaadmin:rAEd dhsS RLit FOp2 vyhD uAYF"\).decode\(\)
req = urllib.request.Request\("https://shiba-with.com/wp-json/wp/v2/posts/161"\)
req.add_header\("Authorization", f"Basic {auth}"\)
resp = urllib.request.urlopen\(req\)
post = json.load\(resp\)

print\(f"タイトル: {post['title']['rendered']}"\)
print\(f"スラッグ: {post['slug']}"\)
print\(f"カテゴリ: {post['categories']}"\)
print\(f"アイキャッチ: {post['featured_media']}"\)

# H2カウント
content = post['content']['rendered']
h2_count = content.count\('<h2'\)
print\(f"H2数: {h2_count}"\)

# 内部リンクチェック
import re
links = re.findall\(r'href="\(https://shiba-with\\.com/[^"]+\)"', content\)
print\(f"\\n内部リンク \({len\(links\)}本\):"\)
for link in links:
    try:
        r = urllib.request.urlopen\(link\)
        print\(f"  {r.status} {link}"\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f"  ERROR {link}: {e}"\)
PYEOF)
